rows.name: Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger
rows.note: Corsair CLIPPER PRO MINI 60 on sale at $99 establishes a new sub-$100 HE price floor. IQUNIX EC75 Computex momentum carries into W24. Community discussion of entry-level HE boards accelerating across Reddit and KeebTalk.

rows.name: HMX Cloud V2
rows.note: Cloud V2 hitting retailer shelves this week — Milktooth shipping as early as June 10, iLumKB and SwitchOddities also showing in-stock. First hands-on impressions landing online; dual-material bottom housing and second-gen lubrication praised broadly.

rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: No new news in W24. Oil King V2 remains in the 2026 catalog at $0.90 per switch but drew no fresh coverage or community threads. Benchmark-status switches trend flat absent a catalyst.

rows.name: Gateron Lanes
rows.note: ThereminGoat review of the Alps SKCM Orange-inspired Gateron Lanes tactiles circulating widely on KeebTalk and Reddit. Reported sell-out cycles driving FOMO; strongest new tactile story entering mid-June.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A
rows.note: No new Cherry news in W24 softens the decline slightly. Dummy switch skepticism persists but has been priced in by the community. Score nudges up 3 points from normalisation rather than any positive catalyst.

rows.name: GMK CYL Prussian Alert
rows.note: Final-day deadline June 12 at 10 PM EDT driving last-call urgency across all vendor pages. Oblotzky-led GB through NovelKeys, KBDfans, Prototypist and nine other global vendors. Score peaks this week; will fall sharply post-closure.

rows.name: GMK CYL Ramune
rows.note: GB closed June 5, now entering silent production queue with Q3–Q4 2026 ship estimates. Community attention shifts away post-closure; sharp score drop reflects the GB exit dynamic common to GMK sets.

rows.name: DCS Dolch
rows.note: Active GB June 1–July 1 at Divinikey. Passing its midpoint with steady daily order flow. Classic Dolch colorway in DCS profile by Signature Plastics continues to attract SA profile converts and retro-colorway fans.

rows.name: GMK CYL Selene
rows.note: Active GB through June 19. Special-effects rainbow glitter plastic maintains steady community attention; US-only availability through Mechanical Keyboards caps addressable market. Closing-week push expected next week.

rows.name: GMK CYL Pandemonium
rows.note: New tracker entrant. Berserk eclipse-themed translucent red legend GB runs June 1–July 1; DeltaKeyCo-designed set available through eight regional vendors including Prototypist. Enthusiast interest building into week two of the run.

rows.name: 75% Layout
rows.note: IQUNIX EC75 Computex halo effect continues into W24. Corsair CLIPPER PRO MINI 60 counters with a 60% narrative, but 75% remains the dominant launch form factor. Score holds near prior week with minimal fresh catalyst.

rows.name: Split / Ergo
rows.note: Keychron Orca Echo shown at Computex Taipei and Tokyo Tenki meetup — 49-key split with trackball and wheel. CannonKeys Link GB closes June 15, driving final-week urgency. Two simultaneous ergo narratives spiking combined category interest.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: No new IC or GB activity. Slight score recovery from -27 as ergo enthusiasm from Orca Echo and CannonKeys Link spills sideways into Alice awareness, but no direct Alice catalyst this week.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Encore 2026 pre-orders remain open with July 2026 ship target but no fresh announcement this week. Now a permanent SKU rather than a limited-run, reducing urgency-driven excitement. Score eases slightly from W23 peak.

rows.name: CannonKeys
rows.note: Link split ergo GB entering final 7-day push before June 15 close. Open-source PCB pledge at 300 units sold is motivating community buy-in. Score jumps on closing-week urgency; also hosting GMK Spark through June 21.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: UK vendor active across GMK Prussian Alert (closing June 12), GMK Pandemonium (live through July 1), and GMK Selene (live through June 19). Three concurrent active GBs plus Prussian Alert final-call traffic driving sustained vendor visibility.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Keychron Orca Echo world premiere at Computex Taipei and Tokyo Tenki meetup generates major split-keyboard coverage. V10 Ultra shipping normally. Crowdfunding opens June 19 on Gizmodo, keeping Keychron in the news cycle all of W24.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: No announcements or shipping updates in W24. WS Morandi continues to receive positive community discussion from ThereminGoat's earlier review. Brand maintains steady in-stock catalog absent any new product news.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK parent)
rows.note: No new brand-level Cherry news in W24. GMK production timelines remain a persistent community frustration; Prussian Alert buyers facing typical 12–18 month waits. Slight score recovery from -28 as no fresh negative news this week.
